title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: GLADSTONE COMMUNITY CENTER DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Provides access to Wi-Fi, coffee, tea, small snacks, and a charging station for phones and other electronics. Lunch is provided three days a week. 1050 Portland Avenue Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: Varies by site Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Lunch: Tuesday-Thursday 11:30am (503) 655-7701 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-7701 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: Center: None Lunch: $4 for age 60 and older, $5 for age 59 and younger DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 31, 32, and 34 Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GLADSTONE COMMUNITY CENTER
